MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_BERSERKER.title: Morgan
MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_BERSERKER.descrip: The tyrant Queen who ruled Fairy Britain for two thousand years - and died countless times to keep it standing. She seeds Curses with replicas of Rhongomyniad, charges her Noble Phantasm across her two lives, and rises from death stronger than before.
MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_BERSERKER.goldMon: Gold is a mere bauble. The only thing I crave is a throne to rule.
MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_BERSERKER.eventDe: Die as I might, time and again — a queen rises from the very end itself.
MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_BERSERKER.aromaPr: I am frozen rain — a queen who clings to none, holding her realm alone.
Watch closely. None may defy a queen's command.
To bow my head over so slight a wound... a queen is not permitted that.
